data.revised_prompt: Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet on a 100% solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background only. Exact sheet layout: 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows, no visible grid lines or borders. Subject: Huo Ying fire lotus pet for Samsara Ascension — a small floating cute fire-lotus spirit, orange-golden petals, tiny ember core face, soft flame leaf shapes, friendly magical companion, clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, readable at 32 to 64 pixel scale, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Full body visible in every cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale in all frames, subject fills about 50–58% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded. Animation: walk cycle with real body pose changes across the 4 frames, not scaling, not camera movement, not glow-only changes, not sliding. Frame 1 top-left: first stride, front limb or leading side moves forward, body leans in travel direction. Frame 2 top-right: passing step, body rises, rear limb or trailing side catches up, cloth or petals trail backward. Frame 3 bottom-left: opposite stride, other limb or side moves forward, weight clearly shifts. Frame 4 bottom-right: passing step returning toward neutral, body lowers slightly; loop reads as movement. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/core-face, costume/armor marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every frame; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change. Entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud. No text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigned subject, alternate forms, photorealism, 3D render, pixel art. Clean readable fantasy RPG sprite sheet, crisp edges, consistent lighting, no background elements.
